spec: The DMA controller should report transfer completion only after all requested bytes are transferred and the AES operation has reached a terminal or inactive state.
pr_title: Fix early DMA completion with AES transfer
pr_body: A one-word DMA/AES transfer can be marked complete before the AES state machine finishes. The completion condition needs to account for the AES state.
commit_message: Gate DMA done on AES idle/done/error state
patch_text:
diff --git a/rtl/dma_controller.sv b/rtl/dma_controller.sv
--- a/rtl/dma_controller.sv
+++ b/rtl/dma_controller.sv
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ always_comb begin
-  dma_done = bytes_done;
+  dma_done = bytes_done && (aes_idle || aes_done || aes_error);
 end
